def positive_json_loads_same_payload_multiple_times():
    rule_id = "json_loads_same_payload_multiple_times"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "The same JSON payload is decoded multiple times inside one function instead of caching the parsed value."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
